title: Stars and Bars Method for Combinations with Repetition
description: A visual representation of selecting k items from n types with repetition allowed, using the stars (items) and bars (dividers between types) method.
elements: Bars (|) representing dividers between different item types
A sequence showing the total arrangement of stars and bars
relationships: The number of stars before the first bar represents selections of type 1
The number of stars between bars represents selections of that type
The number of stars after the last bar represents selections of type n
The total arrangement determines the specific combination with repetition
